name: TinkerTool
description: Access hidden macOS system preferences and settings
min_os: per-build (separate version for each macOS release)

download.note: GET download.php page → extract hidden keys (key1, key2, key3) → POST to download2.php → follow meta-refresh to download3.php. Final file always named TinkerTool.dmg. No direct URL possible.

notes: SEPARATE VERSIONS PER macOS RELEASE. TinkerTool 11 for macOS 26 Tahoe, v10 for Ventura/Sonoma/Sequoia, v8 for Big Sur/Monterey, v7 for Mojave/Catalina. No version 9 exists. Download requires CSRF anti-leeching sequence. No Sparkle, no API. File always named TinkerTool.dmg.
